properties.name: transcript
properties.description: Configures the default behavior for viewing agent transcripts via the aglogs command. Use this section to customize output verbosity and display limits to match your workflow preferences.

children.name: detail_level
children.description: Controls the default verbosity of transcript output. Set to 'summary' for a concise overview of tool usage, or 'full' to inspect complete tool inputs and outputs for debugging purposes.

children.name: max_diff_lines
children.description: Specifies the maximum number of lines to display for file edit diffs before truncating the output. Use a positive integer to prevent large edits from cluttering the terminal, or set to 0 to always show the full diff.
